# API reference

The API docs below are generated from the package modules. This page is curated
to highlight the public surface and leave out internal helpers that are only
there to keep the implementation tidy.

## Package

```{eval-rst}
.. automodule:: goldpy
   :members:
```

## `goldpy.client`

```{eval-rst}
.. automodule:: goldpy.client
   :members:
   :show-inheritance:
```

## `goldpy.models`

```{eval-rst}
.. automodule:: goldpy.models
   :members:
   :show-inheritance:
```

## `goldpy.service`

```{eval-rst}
.. automodule:: goldpy.service
   :members:
   :show-inheritance:
   :exclude-members: _filter_candidates
```

## `goldpy.cli`

```{eval-rst}
.. automodule:: goldpy.cli
   :members: SelectionMode, main, price
```
